title: helichrysum deltoideum
intro: Helichrysum deltoideum, also known as yellow star or goldens, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum deltoideum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Helichrysum deltoideum can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and capsules, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
